headings: h3: As your MP Shaun can help with a variety of issues and concerns.
h2: Here's how we can help you:
h3: How to write to Shaun
text_excerpt: Contact - Shaun Davies MP Shaun.Davies.MP@Parliament.uk 01952 973 714 Home My Work Work Experience latest News Events About Me Contact CONTACT Home My Work Work Experience latest News Events About Me Contact Contact Team Telford Do you need help? As your MP Shaun can help with a variety of issues and concerns. Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol, I am only able to support Telford residents. Here's how we can help you: Write to Shaun Keeping the issue private, I can write to the relevant department, official, or Minister or make a personal appointment to discuss the issue. This can often go a long way to providing a solution to your issue. Making the issue public I can also help to make the issue public by raising it in the House of Commons, where it will be officially recorded, and could potentially come to the attention of the press and public. Meet with Shaun Shaun holds regular surgeries and coffee mornings across Telford every month. Reach out to Shaun via email or post and the team will work with you to listen to your concerns. CONTACT TEAM TELFORD Shaun Davies MP has a small team in both Telford and London working hard to support thousands of residents every month. All mail must be screened before reaching our constituency office for security reasons. Sending mail to the constituency office will lead to delays. Name Description Duration Cookie Preferences This cookie is used to store the user's cookie consent preferences. 30 days Toggle Statistics Statistics Statistics cookies collect information anonymously. This information helps us understand how visitors use our website. Toggle Google Analytics Google Analytics Google Analytics is a powerful tool that tracks and analyzes website traffic for informed marketing decisions. Service URL: policies.google.com (opens in a new window) Name Description Duration _gac_ Contains information related to marketing campaigns of the user. These are shared with Google AdWords / Google Ads when the Google Ads and Google Analytics accounts are linked together. 90 days __utma ID used to identify users and sessions 2 years after last activity __utmt Used to monitor number of Google Analytics server requests 10 minutes __utmb Used to distinguish new sessions and visits. This cookie is set when the GA.js javascript library is loaded and there is no existing __utmb cookie. The cookie is updated every time data is sent to the Google Analytics server. 30 minutes after last activity __utmc Used only with old Urchin versions of Google Analytics and not with GA.js. Was used to distinguish between new sessions and visits at the end of a session. End of session (browser) __utmz Contains information about the traffic source or campaign that directed user to the website. The cookie is set when the GA.js javascript is loaded and updated when data is sent to the Google Anaytics server 6 months after last activity __utmv Contains custom information set by the web developer via the _setCustomVar method in Google Analytics. This cookie is updated every time new data is sent to the Google Analytics server. 2 years after
